name: NVZver
description: Vision — a personal, model-agnostic agentic engineering system. Domain-neutral core, on-demand packs.

plugins.name: lsa
plugins.description: Living Spec Architecture: spec-first methodology with eight skills (init, discover, specify, plan, verify, sync, reconcile, revise-constitution) and human User Verifications at every phase.

plugins.name: maintenance
plugins.description: Repo-content discipline: /maintenance:cleanup audits + trims behavior-bearing Markdown to reduce ship-cost, preserves 6 invariants, stages but never commits. Opt-in. Depends on core.
